name: pufferlib
tagline: Reference skill for building/training RL agents with PufferLib (PPO, vectorized envs, multi-agent) — docs and code patterns only.
verdict: Clean, single-file reference skill with no security red flags: no credential access, no shell-piped remote code, no obfuscation, no hidden instructions, no destructive commands. Install is a plain `uv pip install pufferlib` from PyPI. Minor gap: the main file itself has no explicit error/troubleshooting guidance, deferring that to unreviewed reference/*.md f

highlights.summary: The main SKILL.md itself has no troubleshooting/failure-handling section; error handling is deferred to 'Troubleshooting' subsections inside references/training.md, vectorization.md, integration.md, w
